markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO issues and strategize solutions for Firework's multi-domain architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Major SEO issues stem from inconsistent use of www vs non-www domains, causing Google indexing confusion](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - Migrating entirely to Webflow ([www.firework.com](http://www.firework.com)) and eliminating WordPress/Nginx would resolve many issues
  - [Short-term fix: implement 301 redirects from non-www to www consistently across the site](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Blog performance discrepancies partly due to indexing issues; need to address technical foundation first](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

## Topics

### WWW vs Non-WWW Domain Inconsistency

  - [Current setup uses both www and non-www inconsistently, confusing Google](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Canonical tags often point to different versions than actual URLs](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - Recommendation: standardize on [www.firework.com](http://www.firework.com) for all pages
  - [Implement 301 redirects from non-www to www consistently](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Split Architecture and SEO Impact

  - [Current hybrid WordPress/Webflow setup causing indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Webflow pages actually hosted on webflow.firework.com, masked by Nginx](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [This creates duplicate content issues in Google's eyes](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Proposed solution: migrate fully to Webflow, eliminate WordPress and Nginx routing](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### International/Multilingual SEO

  - [Href lang tags are incorrect, missing country codes](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [French and Spanish sites not performing as expected](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Need to address core technical issues before optimizing international SEO](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Blog Performance Analysis

  - [Stark difference in performance between older and newer blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Many recent posts not being indexed at all](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Likely due to technical issues preventing proper crawling/indexing](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Need to fix foundation before diving deep into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Content Strategy and Topical Relevance

  - [Building topical authority requires consistent, clustered content](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Current architecture issues may be fragmenting topical relevance](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Once technical foundation is fixed, audit content clusters and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to provide detailed document outlining issues and recommendations, prioritized by impact and ease of implementation](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Cameron to meet with infrastructure team to discuss potential changes](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Implement 301 redirects as a short-term fix to standardize on www](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Plan full migration to Webflow, eliminating WordPress and Nginx routing](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meetings with Dave to track progress and address questions](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Address internal linking consistency (trailing slashes, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Once foundation is fixed, audit content strategy and international SEO implementation](https://fathom.video/share/BtL2hSTuHwYxMLWsXxEZA-pqyFD-gLUf?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
